VAL-PR2895-001.evidence: git show --stat ac2e1cfc shows only conductor_overrides_test.go changed; git show --stat 0d35e6ae shows only conductor.go and conductor_overrides_test.go changed. Scope limited to auth conductor slice.

VAL-PR2895-002.evidence: TestManagerExecuteCount_404DoesNotSuspendAuth PASS: single-auth count_tokens 404 returns error without blacking out auth, no cooldown set, no model state cooldown, and no result recorded.

VAL-PR2895-003.evidence: TestManagerExecuteCount_404DoesNotSuspendAuth PASS: post-404 m.Execute succeeds with the same auth, executor called, result recorded as successful.

VAL-PR2895-004.evidence: TestManager_MarkResult_RequestScopedNotFoundDoesNotCooldownAuth and TestManager_RequestScopedNotFoundStopsRetryWithoutSuspendingAuth both PASS: request-scoped 404 on normal execute path stops retrying without blacking out auth.

VAL-PR2895-005.evidence: TestManagerExecuteCount_404DoesNotSuspendAuth PASS (404 exempted) + TestManagerExecuteCount_Non404StillSuspendsAuthAndRecordsResult PASS (non-404 still triggers cooldown): exemption isolated to count_tokens 404 branch only.

VAL-PR2895-006.evidence: TestManagerExecuteCount_Non404StillSuspendsAuthAndRecordsResult PASS: non-404 count_tokens failure sets auth cooldown, marks model unavailable, and follow-up execute is blocked.

VAL-PR2895-007.evidence: TestManagerExecuteCount_Non404StillSuspendsAuthAndRecordsResult PASS: non-404 count_tokens failure records exactly one result with correct auth/provider/model/error fields. recordingHook captures the result.
